Format: YYYY-MM-DD. Difference from order_date = fulfilment days.

description: Listed price per unit in USD
notes: Price before discount applied.

description: Discount fraction applied to the order
notes: Range: 0.00 to 1.00. Multiply by 100 for percentage. E.g. 0.10 = 10%.

description: Actual revenue after discount in USD
notes: Formula: quantity × unit_price × (1 - discount). Primary revenue metric.

description: Gross profit on the order in USD
notes: Calculated as sales × profit_margin / 100.
Range: 0 to 100. Use to filter low-margin orders. Higher is better.

description: Name of the sales representative responsible for the order
notes: Use to build sales performance dashboards.
